validator_reason: Bash `node` execution denied by sandbox permission system on every invocation; manual walk performed against validate_owm.mjs rules (coordinate range, edge endpoints, visibility hard rule) and check_layout.mjs rules (near-duplicate coords, stage-boundary straddling, canvas clipping, stage distribution). All rules pass post-fix per §g of output.md.
notes: Map emphasises March 2023 snapshot date (GPT-4 launched 14 Mar 2023, JWCC awarded Dec 2022, NIST AI RMF v1.0 Jan 2023). Four components received deep-placement research: LLM Synthesis, Model Evaluation/Red-Teaming, Classified Cloud Compute, Prompt Injection/LLM Attacks.
